text.message: Dude how am I a solo block
because you stole me when i am the worst here
I wanted your brick it’s not personal
You already stole me three times
now we are ok, i will not rob you more
Asked for it? You were going to trade your only brick?
When have you ever offered me a one for one on my turn
You insist on lopsided trades no one's going to take your one to ones
Bad block. He has other sheep
Need to block his wood or ore
You guys are just giving it to him lol
Block his wood so he doesn’t take road
